stages.title: Build whitelist
stages.blurb: Catalog every free VCV Rack plugin so only reproducible patches enter the corpus.

stages.title: Fetch metadata
stages.blurb: Scrape PatchStorage for every VCV Rack patch listing.

stages.title: Download patches
stages.blurb: Download each .vcv file, crash-safe and resumable.

stages.title: Parse & filter
stages.blurb: Keep only Rack-2, liked, fully-free patches of sane size.

stages.title: Aggregate
stages.blurb: Count module usage and co-occurrence across the corpus.

stages.title: Port registry
stages.blurb: Clone plugin source and parse C++ enums into port names.

stages.title: Deep analysis
stages.blurb: Decode every patch into named connections and parameter stats.

stages.title: Module profiles
stages.blurb: Merge library metadata and manuals into one profile per module.

stages.title: Reference files
stages.blurb: Write human/AI-readable markdown for every module and patch.

stages.title: Classify & learn
stages.blurb: Distill patch archetypes and connection grammar.

stages.title: Generate
stages.blurb: Compose new .vcv patches from learned archetypes.

stages.title: Render & listen
stages.blurb: Render each patch headlessly, analyze the audio, score fitness, auto-repair.
